docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ"
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ" ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ" ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ"

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ROBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ" $4,225.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,350.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PARTIES HAD A PARTNERSHIP FOR THE OPERATION OF BOTH THE SAN FRANCISCO & OAKLAND STORES. THE PARTIES WERE OBLIGATED TO SHARE THE PROFITS & LOSSES OF THE OAKLAND STORE. DEFENDANT MUST RETURN 1/2 OF THE 5000 HE TOOK FROM THE BANK ACCOUNT AND IS REPOSNSIBLE FOR 1/2 OF THE $3450 IN RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER-NINA SAFTIE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED SEP-18-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ"
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ"
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY PEREZ, ROBERTO JIMENEZ-ROMERO, JOSE AKA "JOSE JIMENEZ"
